file.content:
rbf_check_consecrations() {
  zrbf_sentinel

  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "List consecrations for a vessel by querying GAR tags"
  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # No-arg: list available vessels
  if test -z "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
    local z_sigils
    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
    buc_step "Available vessels:"
    local z_sigil=""
    for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
      buc_bare "        ${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}"
    done
    buc_die "Vessel directory required"
  fi

  # Load vessel
  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"

  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  buc_step "Querying GAR tags for ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
  local -r z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_dc_tags.json"
  curl -sL \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/tags/list" \
    > "${z_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags"

  if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    local z_err
    z_err=$(jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}")
    buc_die "Registry API error: ${z_err}"
  fi

  # Extract tags and group by inscribe timestamp
  # Tags matching: i\d{8}_\d{6}-image[-suffix] or i\d{8}_\d{6}-about or i\d{8}_\d{6}-multi
  local -r z_raw_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_dc_raw.txt"
  jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" | while read -r z_tag; do
    # Extract inscribe timestamp prefix (iYYYYMMDD_HHMMSS)
    local z_ts=""
    if [[ "${z_tag}" =~ ^(i[0-9]{8}_[0-9]{6}) ]]; then
      z_ts="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    else
      continue
    fi

    # Classify the tag
    if [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}" ]] || [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"-* ]]; then
      # -image or -image-amd64 etc
      local z_suffix="${z_tag#*${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}}"
      if test -z "${z_suffix}"; then
        echo "${z_ts}|image|consumer"
      else
        echo "${z_ts}|image|${z_suffix#-}"
      fi
    elif [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}" ]]; then
      echo "${z_ts}|about|"
    elif [[ "${z_tag}" == *"-multi" ]]; then
      echo "${z_ts}|multi|"
    fi
  done > "${z_raw_file}"

  if ! test -s "${z_raw_file}"; then
    buc_info "No consecrations found for ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
    return 0
  fi

  # Group by consecration timestamp and display
  local -r z_report_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_dc_report.txt"
  sort -t'|' -k1,1r "${z_raw_file}" | awk -F'|' '
    {
      ts = $1
      type = $2
      detail = $3

      if (ts != prev_ts) {
        if (prev_ts != "") {
          # Print previous group
          plat_str = (platform_count > 0) ? platforms : "single"
          printf "  %-22s %-30s %d image + %d about\n", prev_ts, plat_str, image_count, about_count
        }
        prev_ts = ts
        image_count = 0
        about_count = 0
        platform_count = 0
        platforms = ""
      }

      if (type == "image") {
        image_count++
        if (detail != "consumer" && detail != "") {
          platform_count++
          if (platforms != "") platforms = platforms ", "
          platforms = platforms detail
        }
      } else if (type == "about") {
        about_count++
      }
    }
    END {
      if (prev_ts != "") {
        plat_str = (platform_count > 0) ? platforms : "single"
        printf "  %-22s %-30s %d image + %d about\n", prev_ts, plat_str, image_count, about_count
      }
    }
  ' > "${z_report_file}"

  printf "\nVessel: %s\n" "${RBRV_SIGIL}"
  printf "  %-22s %-30s %s\n" "Consecration" "Platforms" "Tags"
  cat "${z_report_file}"
  echo ""

  buc_success "Consecration check complete"
}

######################################################################
# Vouch (rbw-Rv)

rbf_vouch() {
  zrbf_sentinel

  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "Verify SLSA provenance on a vessel's per-platform images via Container Analysis API"
  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # No-arg: list available vessels
  if test -z "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
    local z_sigils
    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
    buc_step "Available vessels:"
    local z_sigil=""
    for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
      buc_bare "        ${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}"
    done
    buc_die "Vessel directory required"
  fi

  # Load vessel
  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"

  # Auth as Director (Retriever path deferred — Director has roles/viewer which includes containeranalysis)
  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  # Find the most recent consecration by querying GAR tags
  buc_step "Querying GAR tags for ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
  local -r z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_rv_tags.json"
  curl -sL \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/tags/list" \
    > "${z_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags"

  if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    local z_err
    z_err=$(jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}")
    buc_die "Registry API error: ${z_err}"
  fi

  # Find all -image tags and extract inscribe timestamps, pick most recent
  local -r z_image_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_rv_image_tags.txt"
  jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" | while read -r z_tag; do
    if [[ "${z_tag}" =~ ^(i[0-9]{8}_[0-9]{6})${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}(.*)$ ]]; then
      echo "${BASH_REMATCH[1]}|${z_tag}|${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"
    fi
  done | sort -t'|' -k1,1r > "${z_image_tags_file}"

  if ! test -s "${z_image_tags_file}"; then
    buc_die "No -image tags found for ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
  fi

  # Most recent consecration timestamp
  local z_consecration
  z_consecration=$(head -1 "${z_image_tags_file}" | cut -d'|' -f1)
  test -n "${z_consecration}" || buc_die "Failed to extract consecration timestamp"

  buc_info "Vouching consecration: ${z_consecration}"

  # Collect all -image tags for this consecration
  local -r z_vouch_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_rv_vouch_tags.txt"
  grep "^${z_consecration}|" "${z_image_tags_file}" > "${z_vouch_tags_file}"

  # For each -image tag: resolve digest, query Container Analysis
  local -r z_report_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_rv_report.txt"
  > "${z_report_file}"

  local z_all_build_ids=""
  local z_tag_count=0

  while IFS='|' read -r z_ts z_tag z_plat_suffix; do
    z_tag_count=$((z_tag_count + 1))

    # Determine platform display name
    local z_platform_display=""
    if test -z "${z_plat_suffix}"; then
      z_platform_display="(consumer)"
    else
      z_platform_display="${z_plat_suffix#-}"
    fi

    # Resolve digest via Docker Registry v2 API (HEAD for manifest)
    buc_log_args "Resolving digest for ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_tag}"
    local z_digest_infix="rv_digest_${z_tag_count}"
    local z_manifest_url="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_tag}"
    local z_digest_headers="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_rv_headers_${z_tag_count}.txt"

    local z_head_status=0
    curl -sS \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
      -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
      --head \
      -o /dev/null \
      -D "${z_digest_headers}" \
      -w "%{http_code}" \
      "${z_manifest_url}" > "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_rv_head_code_${z_tag_count}.txt" 2>/dev/null \
      || z_head_status=$?

    if test "${z_head_status}" -ne 0; then
      printf "  %-14s %-14s %-12s %s\n" "${z_platform_display}" "FETCH_ERROR" "-" "-" >> "${z_report_file}"
      continue
    fi

    # Extract Docker-Content-Digest header
    local z_digest=""
    z_digest=$(grep -i '^docker-content-digest:' "${z_digest_headers}" | tr -d '\r' | awk '{print $2}')

    if test -z "${z_digest}"; then
      printf "  %-14s %-14s %-12s %s\n" "${z_platform_display}" "NO_DIGEST" "-" "-" >> "${z_report_file}"
      continue
    fi

    local z_digest_short="${z_digest#sha256:}"
    z_digest_short="${z_digest_short:0:12}"

    # Query Container Analysis for BUILD occurrences
    buc_log_args "Querying Container Analysis for ${z_digest_short}"
    local z_image_uri="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${RBRV_SIGIL}@${z_digest}"
    local z_ca_filter
    z_ca_filter=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "kind=\"BUILD\" AND resourceUrl=\"https://${z_image_uri}\"")

    local z_ca_url="https://containeranalysis.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/occurrences?filter=${z_ca_filter}"
    local z_ca_infix="rv_ca_${z_tag_count}"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_ca_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_ca_infix}"

    local z_ca_code
    z_ca_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_ca_infix}") || z_ca_code=""

    if test "${z_ca_code}" != "200"; then
      printf "  %-14s %-14s %-12s %s\n" "${z_platform_display}" "${z_digest_short}" "HTTP_${z_ca_code}" "-" >> "${z_report_file}"
      continue
    fi

    # Extract SLSA build level and build invocation ID from occurrences
    local z_ca_resp="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_ca_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
    local z_slsa_level=""
    z_slsa_level=$(jq -r '
      [.occurrences[]? | .build.intotoStatement.slsaProvenanceZeroTwo.buildDefinition.externalParameters.buildConfigSource.ref // empty] |
      if length > 0 then "present" else
        [.occurrences[]? | .build.provenance.builtInMaterials // empty] |
        if length > 0 then "present" else "none" end
      end
    ' "${z_ca_resp}" 2>/dev/null) || z_slsa_level=""

    # Try to get the numeric SLSA level from the occurrence note
    local z_slsa_num=""
    z_slsa_num=$(jq -r '
      [.occurrences[]? | .noteName // empty] | first // "none"
    ' "${z_ca_resp}" 2>/dev/null) || z_slsa_num=""

    # Extract slsa_build_level from the discovery/build metadata
    local z_build_level=""
    z_build_level=$(jq -r '
      [.occurrences[]? |
        (.build.intotoStatement.predicate.runDetails.builder.builderDependencies[]?.digest // empty),
        (.envelope.payload // empty)
      ] | first // "unknown"
    ' "${z_ca_resp}" 2>/dev/null) || z_build_level=""

    # More direct: look for slsa_build_level in the flattened structure
    local z_level_direct=""
    z_level_direct=$(jq -r '
      [.occurrences[]? | .. | .slsa_build_level? // empty | select(. != null)] | first // "unknown"
    ' "${z_ca_resp}" 2>/dev/null) || z_level_direct="unknown"

    # Extract build invocation ID
    local z_build_id=""
    z_build_id=$(jq -r '
      [.occurrences[]? |
        .build.intotoStatement.predicate.runDetails.metadata.invocationId //
        .build.provenance.id //
        empty
      ] | first // "unknown"
    ' "${z_ca_resp}" 2>/dev/null) || z_build_id="unknown"

    local z_build_id_short="${z_build_id}"
    if test "${#z_build_id}" -gt 12; then
      z_build_id_short="${z_build_id:0:8}"
    fi

    # Count occurrences (v0.1 and v1 predicates expected)
    local z_occ_count=""
    z_occ_count=$(jq -r '.occurrences | length // 0' "${z_ca_resp}" 2>/dev/null) || z_occ_count="0"

    printf "  %-14s %-14s %-12s %-12s %s\n" \
      "${z_platform_display}" "${z_digest_short}" "${z_level_direct}" "${z_build_id_short}" "${z_occ_count} occ" >> "${z_report_file}"

    # Accumulate build IDs for single-origin check
    if test "${z_build_id}" != "unknown"; then
      if test -z "${z_all_build_ids}"; then
        z_all_build_ids="${z_build_id}"
      elif [[ "${z_all_build_ids}" != *"${z_build_id}"* ]]; then
        z_all_build_ids="${z_all_build_ids} ${z_build_id}"
      fi
    fi
  done < "${z_vouch_tags_file}"

  # Display report
  printf "\nVessel: %s\n" "${RBRV_SIGIL}"
  printf "Consecration: %s\n\n" "${z_consecration}"
  printf "  %-14s %-14s %-12s %-12s %s\n" "Platform" "Digest" "SLSA Level" "Build ID" "Evidence"
  cat "${z_report_file}"

  # Single-build origin check
  local z_id_count=0
  local z_id=""
  for z_id in ${z_all_build_ids}; do
    z_id_count=$((z_id_count + 1))
  done

  echo ""
  if test "${z_id_count}" -eq 1; then
    buc_success "Build origin: single invocation (all IDs match)"
  elif test "${z_id_count}" -eq 0; then
    buc_warn "Build origin: no build invocation IDs found"
  else
    buc_warn "Build origin: MULTIPLE invocations detected (${z_id_count} distinct IDs)"
  fi

  buc_success "Vouch complete"
}

content.thinking:
Now I can see both functions. The paddock mentioned "BCG review needed" - let me check for BCG issues. The paddock says:
- stderr capture
- temp file patterns
- `local -r`
- no piped while-read subshells

Looking at the code:

1. **Piped while-read subshell issue in `rbf_check_consecrations()`** (line 1648): `jq ... | while read -r z_tag; do ... done > "${z_raw_file}"` — this is a piped while-read which runs in a subshell. The `local` declarations inside won't work correctly. BCG likely forbids this.


2. **Same pattern appears in `rbf_vouch()`** (line 1776) with `jq ... | while read -r z_tag; do ... done | sort ...`
3. **`local -r` declarations** scattered throughout (lines 1605, 1631, 1647, etc.) — need to verify BCG allows readonly locals
4. **stderr handling** — need to check if curl and jq errors are being captured properly

Let me review the BCG rules and also look for any `ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE` references.

I should also verify that `ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES` is actually defined somewhere, since it's used in the vouch function.

content.text: Now let me check the BCG guide for the patterns flagged in the paddock, and verify the referenced variables exist.

    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Google Utility - Implementation
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBGU_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgu multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBGU_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbgu_*)
    29→
    30→zrbgu_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGU_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgu already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Validate dependencies
    34→  buv_dir_exists "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
    35→
    36→  # Ensure dependencies kindled first
    37→  zrbgc_sentinel
    38→  zrbgo_sentinel
    39→
    40→  # Module prefix for temp files
    41→  readonly ZRBGU_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgu_"
    42→  readonly ZRBGU_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}empty.json"
    43→  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGU_EMPTY_JSON}"
    44→
    45→  # Infix values for HTTP operations
    46→  readonly ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON="_u_resp.json"
    47→  readonly ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE="_u_code.txt"
    48→
    49→  # Validate eventual consistency settings from rbgc
    50→  test -n "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC:-}" || buc_die "RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC unset"
    51→  test -n "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC:-}"      || buc_die "RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC unset"
    52→
    53→  readonly ZRBGU_KINDLED=1
    54→}
    55→
    56→zrbgu_sentinel() {
    57→  test "${ZRBGU_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgu not kindled - call zrbgu_kindle first"
    58→}
    59→
    60→######################################################################
    61→# Predicate Functions
    62→
    63→rbgu_json_valid_predicate() {
    64→  zrbgu_sentinel
    65→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
    66→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
    67→
    68→  local -r z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
    69→  test -f "${z_json_file}" || return 1
    70→
    71→  jq -e . "${z_json_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1
    72→}
    73→
    74→rbgu_role_member_exists_predicate() {
    75→  zrbgu_sentinel
    76→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
    77→  local -r z_role="${2:-}"
    78→  local -r z_member="${3:-}"
    79→
    80→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
    81→  test -n "${z_role}"  || return 1
    82→  test -n "${z_member}" || return 1
    83→
    84→  local -r z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
    85→  test -f "${z_json_file}" || return 1
    86→
    87→  jq -e --arg r "${z_role}" --arg m "${z_member}" \
    88→    'any(.bindings[]? | select(.role==$r) | .members[]?; . == $m)' \
    89→    "${z_json_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1
    90→}
    91→
    92→######################################################################
    93→# Capture Functions
    94→
    95→rbgu_error_message_capture() {
    96→  zrbgu_sentinel
    97→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
    98→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
    99→
   100→  if rbgu_json_valid_predicate "${z_infix}"; then
   101→    rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message' 2>/dev/null || return 1
   102→  else
   103→    return 1
   104→  fi
   105→}
   106→
   107→rbgu_urlencode_capture() {
   108→  zrbgu_sentinel
   109→  local z_s="${1:-}"
   110→  local z_out=""
   111→  local z_i=0
   112→  local z_c
   113→  local z_hex
   114→
   115→  buc_log_args "Percent encoding -> ${z_s}"
   116→
   117→  while test ${z_i} -lt ${#z_s}; do
   118→    z_c="${z_s:z_i:1}"
   119→    case "${z_c}" in
   120→      [A-Za-z0-9._~\-]) z_out="${z_out}${z_c}" ;;
   121→      *) printf -v z_hex '%%%02X' "'${z_c}"; z_out="${z_out}${z_hex}" ;;
   122→    esac
   123→    z_i=$((z_i + 1))
   124→  done
   125→
   126→  buc_log_args "Encoded ${z_out}"
   127→  test -n "${z_out}" || return 1
   128→  echo "${z_out}"
   129→}
   130→
   131→# Compose service account email from name and project ID.
   132→# Args: account_name project_id
   133→# Returns: name@project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
   134→rbgu_sa_email_capture() {
   135→  zrbgu_sentinel
   136→
   137→  local -r z_name="${1:-}"
   138→  local -r z_project="${2:-}"
   139→
   140→  test -n "${z_name}"    || return 1
   141→  test -n "${z_project}" || return 1
   142→
   143→  echo "${z_name}@${z_project}.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"
   144→}
   145→
   146→# Add member to IAM policy role binding with version=3 enforcement
   147→#
   148→# RBGU IAM Policy Standard: All IAM policies are standardized to version=3
   149→# to ensure consistent conditional role binding support across Google Cloud APIs.
   150→# This is enforced by default in all policy operations to prevent version drift.
   151→#
   152→# Args: infix role member [etag_optional]
   153→# Returns: JSON policy string with added member and version=3
   154→rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture() {
   155→  zrbgu_sentinel
   156→
   157→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
   158→  local -r z_role="${2:-}"
   159→  local -r z_member="${3:-}"
   160→  local -r z_etag_opt="${4:-}"
   161→
   162→  local -r z_policy_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   163→
   164→  test -n "${z_policy_file}" || return 1
   165→  test -f "${z_policy_file}" || return 1
   166→  test -n "${z_role}"        || return 1
   167→  test -n "${z_member}"      || return 1
   168→
   169→  local z_out=""
   170→  z_out=$(
   171→    jq --arg role "${z_role}" --arg member "${z_member}" --arg etag "${z_etag_opt}" '
   172→      # Enforce RBGU standard: version=3 for all IAM policies
   173→      .version = 3 |
   174→      .bindings = (.bindings // []) |
   175→      if ([.bindings[]? | .role] | index($role))
   176→      then .bindings |= map(if .role == $role
   177→                            then .members = ((.members // []) + [$member] | unique)
   178→                            else . end)
   179→      else .bindings += [{role: $role, members: [$member]}]
   180→      end
   181→      # Set etag if provided (optimistic concurrency)
   182→      | (if $etag != "" then .etag = $etag else . end)
   183→    ' "${z_policy_file}"
   184→  ) || return 1
   185→
   186→  test -n "${z_out}" || return 1
   187→  printf '%s\n' "${z_out}"
   188→}
   189→
   190→rbgu_json_field_capture() {
   191→  zrbgu_sentinel
   192→  local -r z_infix="${1}"
   193→  local -r z_jq="${2}"
   194→  local -r z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   195→  local z_result
   196→  z_result=$(jq -r "${z_jq}" "${z_json_file}")          || return 1
   197→  test -n "${z_result}" && test "${z_result}" != "null" || return 1
   198→  echo "${z_result}"
   199→}
   200→
   201→rbgu_http_code_capture() {
   202→  zrbgu_sentinel
   203→  local -r z_infix="${1}"
   204→  local -r z_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   205→  local z_code
   206→  z_code=$(<"${z_file}") || return 1
   207→  test -n "${z_code}"    || return 1
   208→  echo "${z_code}"
   209→}
   210→
   211→rbgu_get_governor_token_capture() {
   212→  zrbgu_sentinel
   213→
   214→  # Need access to RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE from regime
   215→  test -n "${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE:-}" || return 1
   216→
   217→  local z_token
   218→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}") || return 1
   219→
   220→  test -n "${z_token}" || return 1
   221→  echo    "${z_token}"
   222→}
   223→
   224→rbgu_authenticate_role_capture() {
   225→  zrbgu_sentinel
   226→
   227→  local -r z_rbra_file="${1}"
   228→
   229→  test -n "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1
   230→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1
   231→  
   232→  buc_log_args "Authenticating with RBRA file: ${z_rbra_file}"
   233→  
   234→  source "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1
   235→  
   236→  local z_token
   237→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || return 1
   238→  
   239→  test -n "${z_token}" || return 1
   240→  
   241→  echo "${z_token}"
   242→}
   243→
   244→# JSON file writer helper (vanilla empty policy)
   245→rbgu_write_vanilla_json() {
   246→  zrbgu_sentinel
   247→  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
   248→  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
   249→
   250→  local -r z_json_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   251→  printf '{"bindings":[]}\n' > "${z_json_file}" || return 1
   252→  test -f                      "${z_json_file}" || return 1
   253→}
   254→
   255→# Apply jq filter to file, writing result to same or different file
   256→rbgu_jq_file_to_file_ok() {
   257→  zrbgu_sentinel
   258→  local -r z_source_infix="${1:-}"
   259→  local -r z_target_infix="${2:-}"
   260→  local -r z_jq_filter="${3:-}"
   261→
   262→  test -n "${z_source_infix}" || return 1
   263→  test -n "${z_target_infix}" || return 1
   264→  test -n "${z_jq_filter}"    || return 1
   265→
   266→  local -r z_source_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_source_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   267→  local -r z_target_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_target_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   268→
   269→  test -f "${z_source_file}" || return 1
   270→
   271→  jq "${z_jq_filter}" "${z_source_file}" > "${z_target_file}" || return 1
   272→  test -f "${z_target_file}" || return 1
   273→}
   274→
   275→######################################################################
   276→# External Functions (rbgu_*)
   277→
   278→# JSON REST helper (hardcoded headers)
   279→# Args: method url token infix [body_file]
   280→# Pass "-" as body_file to read body from stdin (curl @- convention).
   281→# Use this for request bodies containing secrets to avoid disk persistence.
   282→rbgu_http_json() {
   283→  zrbgu_sentinel
   284→
   285→  local -r z_method="${1}"
   286→  local -r z_url="${2}"
   287→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   288→  local -r z_infix="${4}"
   289→  local -r z_body_file="${5:-}"
   290→
   291→  local z_curl_status=0
   292→  local z_attempt=0
   293→  local -r z_max_attempts=3
   294→  local -r z_retry_sleep=3
   295→
   296→  while :; do
   297→    z_curl_status=0
   298→    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
   299→
   300→    # Each attempt writes to uniquely-suffixed files; callers use z_infix_u
   301→    z_infix_u="${z_infix}_${z_attempt}"
   302→    local z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   303→    local z_code_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   304→    local z_code_errs="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}.stderr"
   305→
   306→    if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
   307→      curl                                              \
   308→          -sS                                           \
   309→          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   310→          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   311→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   312→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   313→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   314→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   315→          -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
   316→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   317→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   318→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   319→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   320→        || z_curl_status=$?
   321→    else
   322→      curl                                              \
   323→          -sS                                           \
   324→          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   325→          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   326→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   327→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   328→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   329→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   330→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   331→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   332→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   333→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   334→        || z_curl_status=$?
   335→    fi
   336→
   337→    buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
   338→    buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"
   339→
   340→    # Success — break out of retry loop
   341→    test "${z_curl_status}" -ne 0 || break
   342→
   343→    # Retry on transient curl errors: 7=connection refused, 28=timeout,
   344→    # 35=SSL error, 56=recv failure. Die immediately on all others.
   345→    case "${z_curl_status}" in
   346→      7|28|35|56) ;;
   347→      *) buc_die "HTTP request failed (curl exit ${z_curl_status})" ;;
   348→    esac
   349→
   350→    test "${z_attempt}" -lt "${z_max_attempts}" \
   351→      || buc_die "HTTP request failed after ${z_max_attempts} attempts (curl exit ${z_curl_status})"
   352→
   353→    buc_log_args "Transient curl error (exit ${z_curl_status}), retry ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts} in ${z_retry_sleep}s"
   354→    sleep "${z_retry_sleep}"
   355→  done
   356→
   357→  # Register successful attempt under bare infix for capture functions
   358→  cp "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}" "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   359→  cp "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix_u}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}" "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   360→
   361→  local z_code
   362→  z_code=$(<"${z_code_file}") || buc_die "Failed to read code file"
   363→  test -n "${z_code}"         || buc_die "Empty HTTP code from curl"
   364→
   365→  buc_log_args "HTTP ${z_method} ${z_url} returned code ${z_code}"
   366→}
   367→
   368→rbgu_http_json_remit() {
   369→  zrbgu_sentinel
   370→
   371→  local -r z_method="${1}"
   372→  local -r z_url="${2}"
   373→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   374→  local -r z_infix="${4}"

   376→

   381→
   382→  while :; do
   383→    z_curl_status=0
   384→    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
   385→
   386→    local z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   387→    local z_code_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}"
   388→    local z_code_errs="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_CODE}.stderr"
   389→
   390→    if test -n "${z_body_file}"; then
   391→      curl                                              \
   392→          -sS                                           \
   393→          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   394→          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   395→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   396→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   397→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   398→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   399→          -d @"${z_body_file}"                          \
   400→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \

   402→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   403→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   404→        || z_curl_status=$?
   405→    else
   406→      curl                                              \
   407→          -sS                                           \
   408→          --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
   409→          --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"        \
   410→          -X "${z_method}"                              \
   411→          -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"         \
   412→          -H "Content-Type: application/json"           \
   413→          -H "Accept: application/json"                 \
   414→          -o "${z_resp_file}"                           \
   415→          -w "%{http_code}"                             \
   416→          "${z_url}" > "${z_code_file}"                 \
   417→                    2> "${z_code_errs}"                 \
   418→        || z_curl_status=$?
   419→    fi
   420→
   421→    buc_log_args 'Curl status' "${z_curl_status}"
   422→    buc_log_pipe < "${z_code_errs}"
   423→
   424→    test "${z_curl_status}" -ne 0 || break
   425→
   426→    case "${z_curl_status}" in
   427→      7|28|35|56) ;;
   428→      *)
   429→        buc_log_args "HTTP request failed (curl exit ${z_curl_status})"
   430→        return 1
   431→        ;;
   432→    esac
   433→
   434→    if test "${z_attempt}" -ge "${z_max_attempts}"; then
   435→      buc_log_args "HTTP request failed after ${z_max_attempts} attempts (curl exit ${z_curl_status})"
   436→      return 1
   437→    fi
   438→
   439→    buc_log_args "Transient curl error (exit ${z_curl_status}), retry ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts} in ${z_retry_sleep}s"
   440→    sleep "${z_retry_sleep}"
   441→  done
   442→
   443→  local z_code
   444→  z_code=$(<"${z_code_file}") || { buc_log_args "Failed to read code file"; return 1; }
   445→  test -n "${z_code}"         || { buc_log_args "Empty HTTP code from curl"; return 1; }
   446→
   447→  buc_log_args "HTTP ${z_method} ${z_url} returned code ${z_code}"
   448→  printf '%s' "${BUC_REMIT_VALID}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_code}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_resp_file}"
   449→}
   450→
   451→rbgu_http_ok_remit() {
   452→  zrbgu_sentinel
   453→
   454→  local -r z_label="${1}"
   455→  local -r z_token="${2}"
   456→  local -r z_method="${3}"
   457→  local -r z_url="${4}"
   458→  local -r z_infix="${5}"
   459→  local -r z_body_file="${6}"
   460→  local -r z_warn_code="${7:-}"
   461→  local -r z_warn_msg="${8:-}"
   462→
   463→  buc_log_args "${z_label}"
   464→
   465→  local z_remit_valid z_code z_resp
   466→  IFS="${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}" read -r z_remit_valid z_code z_resp \
   467→    <<< "$(rbgu_http_json_remit "${z_method}" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body_file:-}")"
   468→
   469→  test "${z_remit_valid}" = "${BUC_REMIT_VALID}" || return 1
   470→
   471→  case "${z_code}" in
   472→    200|201|204)
   473→      printf '%s' "${BUC_REMIT_VALID}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_code}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_resp}"
   474→      return 0
   475→      ;;
   476→  esac
   477→
   478→  if test -n "${z_warn_code}" && test "${z_code}" = "${z_warn_code}"; then
   479→    printf '%s' "${BUC_REMIT_VALID}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_code}${BUC_REMIT_DELIMITER}${z_resp}"
   480→    return 0
   481→  fi
   482→
   483→  local z_err=""
   484→  if jq -e . "${z_resp}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   485→    z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message') || z_err="Unknown error"
   486→  else
   487→    local z_content
   488→    z_content=$(<"${z_resp}") || z_content=""
   489→    z_err="${z_content:0:200}"
   490→    z_err="${z_err//$'\n'/ }"
   491→    z_err="${z_err//$'\r'/ }"
   492→    test -n "${z_err}" || z_err="Non-JSON error body"
   493→  fi
   494→
   495→  buc_log_args "${z_label} (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   496→  return 1
   497→}
   498→
   499→rbgu_http_require_ok() {
   500→  zrbgu_sentinel
   501→  local -r z_ctx="$1"
   502→  local -r z_infix="$2"
   503→  local -r z_warn_code="${3:-}"
   504→  local -r z_warn_message="${4:-already exists}"
   505→
   506→  local z_code
   507→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") \
   508→    || buc_die "${z_ctx}: failed to read HTTP code"
   509→
   510→  case "${z_code}" in
   511→    200|201|204) return 0 ;;
   512→  esac
   513→
   514→  if test -n "${z_warn_code}" && test "${z_code}" = "${z_warn_code}"; then
   515→    buc_warn "${z_ctx}: ${z_warn_message}"
   516→    return 0
   517→  fi
   518→
   519→  local z_err=""
   520→  local -r z_response_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   521→
   522→  if jq -e . "${z_response_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   523→    z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message') || z_err="Unknown error"
   524→  else
   525→    local z_content=$(<"${z_response_file}")
   526→    test -n "${z_content}" || z_content=""
   527→    z_err="${z_content:0:200}"
   528→    z_err="${z_err//$'\n'/ }"
   529→    z_err="${z_err//$'\r'/ }"
   530→    test -n "${z_err}" || z_err="Non-JSON error body"
   531→  fi
   532→
   533→  buc_die "${z_ctx} (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   534→}
   535→
   536→rbgu_http_json_ok() {
   537→  zrbgu_sentinel
   538→
   539→  local -r z_label="$1"
   540→  local -r z_token="$2"
   541→  local -r z_method="$3"
   542→  local -r z_url="$4"
   543→  local -r z_infix="$5"
   544→  local -r z_body_file="$6"
   545→  local -r z_warn_code="${7:-}"
   546→  local -r z_warn_message="${8:-}"
   547→
   548→  buc_log_args "${z_label}"
   549→
   550→  # Perform HTTP request (body file may be "")
   551→  rbgu_http_json "${z_method}" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body_file:-}"
   552→
   553→  # Enforce success (warn/ignore if optional params provided)
   554→  rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}" "${z_warn_code:-}" "${z_warn_message:-}"
   555→}
   556→
   557→# POST + strict LRO handling (no heuristics)
   558→rbgu_http_json_lro_ok() {
   559→  zrbgu_sentinel
   560→
   561→  local -r z_label="${1}"
   562→  local -r z_token="${2}"
   563→  local -r z_post_url="${3}"
   564→  local -r z_infix="${4}"
   565→  local -r z_body="${5}"
   566→  local -r z_name_jq="${6}"
   567→  local -r z_poll_root="${7}"
   568→  local -r z_op_prefix="${8}"
   569→  local -r z_poll_interval="${9:-${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
   570→  local -r z_timeout="${10:-${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
   571→
   572→  buc_log_args '1) POST the request'
   573→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_post_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body}"
   574→  rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}"
   575→
   576→  local z_done=""
   577→  z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   578→  test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
   579→    local z_lro_error=""
   580→    z_lro_error=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
   581→    if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
   582→      local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   583→      buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
   584→      buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
   585→    fi
   586→    buc_log_args 'Immediate-done response -> success (no polling)'
   587→    return 0
   588→  }
   589→
   590→  buc_log_args '2) Extract op name (or return if not an LRO)'
   591→  local z_name
   592→  z_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" "${z_name_jq}") || z_name=""
   593→  test -n "${z_name}" || {
   594→    buc_log_args 'No LRO name present - treat as non-LRO success'
   595→    return 0
   596→  }
   597→  buc_log_args '3) Build poll URL based on operation name format'
   598→  local z_poll_url
   599→  if [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/locations/.*/operations/ ]]; then
   600→    buc_log_args '  Regional operation with fully-qualified name'
   601→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   602→  elif [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/operations/ ]]; then
   603→    buc_log_args '  Global operation with project prefix'
   604→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   605→  elif test -n "${z_op_prefix}" && [[ ! "${z_name}" =~ ^${z_op_prefix} ]]; then
   606→    buc_log_args '  Legacy format - apply prefix (not already present)'
   607→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_op_prefix}${z_name}"
   608→  else
   609→    buc_log_args '  Use name as-is under versioned root'
   610→    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
   611→  fi
   612→  buc_log_args "Poll URL: ${z_poll_url}"
   613→
   614→  buc_log_args '4) Poll until done or timeout'
   615→  local z_elapsed=0
   616→  while :; do
   617→    sleep "${z_poll_interval}"
   618→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + z_poll_interval))
   619→
   620→    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-poll-${z_elapsed}s"
   621→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_poll_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}"
   622→
   623→    local z_code=""
   624→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
   625→    test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "${z_label}: poll failed (HTTP ${z_code})"
   626→
   627→    z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   628→    test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
   629→      local z_lro_error=""
   630→      z_lro_error=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
   631→      if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
   632→        local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_poll_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
   633→        buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
   634→        buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
   635→      fi
   636→      buc_log_args "${z_label}: operation completed after ${z_elapsed}s"
   637→      return 0
   638→    }
   639→
   640→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${z_timeout}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${z_timeout}s"
   641→    buc_log_args "Still running at ${z_elapsed}s..."
   642→  done
   643→}
   644→
   645→# Poll endpoint until HTTP 200 (for IAM/resource propagation waits)
   646→rbgu_poll_until_ok() {
   647→  zrbgu_sentinel
   648→
   649→  local -r z_method="${1}"
   650→  local -r z_label="${2}"
   651→  local -r z_url="${3}"
   652→  local -r z_token="${4}"
   653→  local -r z_infix="${5}"
   654→
   655→  local z_elapsed=0
   656→  while :; do
   657→    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-${z_elapsed}s"
   658→    rbgu_http_json "${z_method}" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}" || true
   659→
   660→    local z_code
   661→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
   662→
   663→    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
   664→      buc_log_args "${z_label} ready after ${z_elapsed} seconds"
   665→      return 0
   666→    fi
   667→
   668→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s"
   669→    buc_log_args "${z_label} not ready (HTTP ${z_code}), waiting ${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s..."
   670→    sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   671→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
   672→  done
   673→}
   674→
   675→# Predicate: Check if resource was newly created and apply propagation delay
   676→rbgu_newly_created_delay() {
   677→  zrbgu_sentinel
   678→
   679→  local -r z_infix="${1}"
   680→  local -r z_resource="${2}"
   681→  local -r z_delay="${3}"
   682→
   683→  local z_code
   684→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
   685→
   686→  if test "${z_code}" = "200" || test "${z_code}" = "201"; then
   687→    buc_step "Resource ${z_resource} newly created, waiting ${z_delay}s for propagation"
   688→    sleep "${z_delay}"
   689→  fi
   690→}
   691→
   692→rbgu_extract_json_to_rbra() {
   693→  zrbgu_sentinel
   694→
   695→  local -r z_json_path="$1"
   696→  local -r z_rbra_path="$2"
   697→  local -r z_lifetime_sec="$3"
   698→  local -r z_expected_project_id="${4:-}"
   699→
   700→  test -f "${z_json_path}" || buc_die "Service account JSON not found: ${z_json_path}"
   701→
   702→  buc_info "Extracting service account credentials from JSON"
   703→
   704→  buc_log_args 'Extract fields'
   705→  local z_client_email
   706→  z_client_email=$(jq -r '.client_email' "${z_json_path}") \
   707→                                        || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email"
   708→  test -n "${z_client_email}"           || buc_die "Empty client_email in JSON"
   709→  test    "${z_client_email}" != "null" || buc_die "Null client_email in JSON"
   710→
   711→  local z_private_key
   712→  z_private_key=$(jq -r '.private_key' "${z_json_path}") \
   713→                                       || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key"
   714→  test -n "${z_private_key}"           || buc_die "Empty private_key in JSON"
   715→  test    "${z_private_key}" != "null" || buc_die "Null private_key in JSON"
   716→
   717→  local z_project_id
   718→  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.project_id' "${z_json_path}") \
   719→                                      || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id"
   720→  test -n "${z_project_id}"           || buc_die "Empty project_id in JSON"
   721→  test    "${z_project_id}" != "null" || buc_die "Null project_id in JSON"
   722→
   723→  if [ -n "${z_expected_project_id}" ]; then
   724→    buc_log_args "Verify project matches expected: ${z_expected_project_id}"
   725→    test "${z_project_id}" = "${z_expected_project_id}" \
   726→      || buc_die "Project mismatch: JSON has '${z_project_id}', expected '${z_expected_project_id}'"
   727→  else
   728→    buc_log_args "No project validation - accepting JSON project_id: ${z_project_id}"
   729→  fi
   730→
   731→  buc_log_args 'Write RBRA file'
   732→  {
   733→    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "$z_client_email"
   734→    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "$z_private_key"; printf '"\n'
   735→    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "$z_project_id"
   736→    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=%s\n'  "$z_lifetime_sec"
   737→  } > "${z_rbra_path}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_path}"
   738→
   739→  test -f "${z_rbra_path}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file: ${z_rbra_path}"
   740→
   741→  buc_warn "Consider deleting source JSON after verification: ${z_json_path}"
   742→}

   744→######################################################################
   745→# RBTOE Pattern Functions
   746→
   747→# RBTOE: API Enable Pattern
   748→# Ensures a specified Google Cloud API is enabled in a project with idempotent behavior
   749→rbgu_api_enable() {
   750→  zrbgu_sentinel
   751→
   752→  local -r z_api_service="${1}"
   753→  local -r z_project_id="${2}"
   754→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   755→
   756→  test -n "${z_api_service}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: API service name required"
   757→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: project ID required"
   758→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: access token required"
   759→
   760→  buc_log_args "Enabling API ${z_api_service} in project ${z_project_id}"
   761→
   762→  local -r z_infix="api-enable-${z_api_service}"
   763→  local -r z_enable_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com:enable"
   764→  
   765→  # Attempt to enable the API
   766→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_enable_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" ""
   767→  
   768→  local z_code
   769→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || buc_die "rbgu_api_enable: failed to read HTTP code"
   770→  
   771→  case "${z_code}" in
   772→    200|201|204) 
   773→      buc_log_args "API enable request successful (HTTP ${z_code})"
   774→      ;;
   775→    400)
   776→      # Check if already enabled
   777→      local z_err
   778→      z_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
   779→      if [[ "${z_err}" =~ already.enabled ]] || [[ "${z_err}" =~ "already enabled" ]]; then
   780→        buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} already enabled"
   781→        return 0
   782→      else
   783→        buc_die "rbgu_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   784→      fi
   785→      ;;
   786→    *)
   787→      local z_err
   788→      z_err=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
   789→      buc_die "rbgu_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
   790→      ;;
   791→  esac
   792→  
   793→  # Check if this returned an LRO that needs polling
   794→  local z_operation_name
   795→  z_operation_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".name") || z_operation_name=""
   796→
   797→  if [ -n "${z_operation_name}" ]; then
   798→    buc_log_args "API enable returned LRO, polling for completion"
   799→    # Use the LRO polling mechanism
   800→    local -r z_poll_root="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1"
   801→    rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \
   802→      "API Enable ${z_api_service}" \
   803→      "${z_token}" \
   804→      "${z_enable_url}" \
   805→      "${z_infix}" \
   806→      "" \
   807→      ".name" \
   808→      "${z_poll_root}" \
   809→      ""
   810→  fi
   811→
   812→  # Verify API is enabled
   813→  local -r z_verify_infix="api-verify-${z_api_service}"
   814→  local -r z_verify_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com"
   815→  
   816→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_verify_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_verify_infix}" ""
   817→  rbgu_http_require_ok "API Enable Verify ${z_api_service}" "${z_verify_infix}"
   818→
   819→  local z_state
   820→  z_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".state") || buc_die "Failed to read API state"
   821→
   822→  if [ "${z_state}" != "ENABLED" ]; then
   823→    buc_die "API ${z_api_service} not enabled after request (state: ${z_state})"
   824→  fi
   825→
   826→  buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} confirmed enabled"
   827→}
   828→
   829→# Provision service agent (Google-managed service account) for an enabled API.
   830→# Uses serviceusage.googleapis.com generateServiceIdentity to deterministically
   831→# ensure the service agent exists before granting it IAM roles.
   832→# Prints the service agent email to stdout.
   833→rbgu_provision_service_agent() {
   834→  zrbgu_sentinel
   835→
   836→  local -r z_api_service="${1}"
   837→  local -r z_project_id="${2}"
   838→  local -r z_token="${3}"
   839→
   840→  test -n "${z_api_service}" || buc_die "rbgu_provision_service_agent: API service name required"
   841→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "rbgu_provision_service_agent: project ID required"
   842→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbgu_provision_service_agent: access token required"
   843→
   844→  buc_log_args "Provisioning service agent for ${z_api_service} in ${z_project_id}"
   845→
   846→  local -r z_infix="provision-sa-${z_api_service}"
   847→  local -r z_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1beta1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com:generateServiceIdentity"
   848→
   849→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" ""
   850→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Provision service agent ${z_api_service}" "${z_infix}"
   851→
   852→  local z_done
   853→  z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   854→
   855→  local z_final_infix="${z_infix}"
   856→  if test "${z_done}" != "true"; then
   857→    local z_op_name
   858→    z_op_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".name") || buc_die "Provision ${z_api_service}: no operation name"
   859→    local -r z_poll_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1beta1/${z_op_name}"
   860→
   861→    local z_elapsed=0
   862→    while :; do
   863→      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   864→      z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
   865→
   866→      z_final_infix="${z_infix}-poll-${z_elapsed}s"
   867→      rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_poll_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_final_infix}"
   868→
   869→      local z_code
   870→      z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_final_infix}") || z_code=""
   871→      test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "Provision ${z_api_service}: poll failed (HTTP ${z_code})"
   872→
   873→      z_done=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_final_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
   874→      test "${z_done}" = "true" && break
   875→
   876→      test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" \
   877→        && buc_die "Provision ${z_api_service}: timeout after ${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s"
   878→      buc_log_args "Provision ${z_api_service}: still running at ${z_elapsed}s..."
   879→    done
   880→  fi
   881→
   882→  local z_email
   883→  z_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_final_infix}" ".response.email") || z_email=""
   884→  test -n "${z_email}" || buc_die "Provision service agent ${z_api_service}: no email in response"
   885→
   886→  buc_log_args "Service agent provisioned: ${z_email}"
   887→  printf '%s' "${z_email}"
   888→}
   889→
   890→# RBTOE: RBRA Load Pattern
   891→# Sources an RBRA file and validates required fields
   892→rbgu_rbra_load() {
   893→  zrbgu_sentinel
   894→
   895→  local -r z_rbra_file="${1}"
   896→
   897→  test -n "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA file path required"
   898→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA file not found: ${z_rbra_file}"
   899→
   900→  buc_log_args "Loading and validating RBRA credentials from ${z_rbra_file}"
   901→
   902→  # Source the RBRA file
   903→  # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   904→  source "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: failed to source RBRA file"
   905→
   906→  # Validate required fields
   907→  test -n "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   908→  test -n "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   909→  test -n "${RBRA_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PROJECT_ID missing from ${z_rbra_file}"
   910→
   911→  # Check for null values
   912→  test "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   913→  test "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   914→  test "${RBRA_PROJECT_ID}" != "null" || buc_die "rbgu_rbra_load: RBRA_PROJECT_ID is null in ${z_rbra_file}"
   915→
   916→  buc_log_args "RBRA validation successful: ${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL} in project ${RBRA_PROJECT_ID}"
   917→}
   918→
   919→# RBTOE: RBRO Load Pattern
   920→# Loads and validates RBRO credentials
   921→rbgu_rbro_load() {
   922→  zrbgu_sentinel
   923→
   924→  buc_log_args "Loading RBRO OAuth credentials"
   925→
   926→  # Source regime module if not already loaded
   927→  if test -z "${ZRBRO_SOURCED:-}"; then
   928→    # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   929→    source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbro_regime.sh"
   930→  fi
   931→
   932→  # Delegate to regime's canonical load
   933→  rbro_load
   934→
   935→  buc_log_args "RBRO validation successful"
   936→}
   937→
   938→######################################################################
   939→# Rubric Infrastructure Checks
   940→
   941→rbgu_check_rubric_repo_url() {
   942→  zrbgu_sentinel
   943→
   944→  local -r z_url="${1:-}"
   945→  test -n "${z_url}" || buc_die "Rubric repo URL is empty — set RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL in rbrr.env"
   946→
   947→  buc_log_args "Validating rubric repo URL reachability"
   948→  git ls-remote "${z_url}" HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1 \
   949→    || buc_die "Rubric repo URL is unreachable — check RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL in rbrr.env"
   950→
   951→  buc_log_args "Rubric repo URL validated"
   952→}
   953→
   954→zrbgu_gitlab_tokens_url_capture() {
   955→  zrbgu_sentinel
   956→
   957→  local z_url="${RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL:-}"
   958→  case "${z_url}" in
   959→    https://gitlab.com/*) ;;
   960→    *) return 1 ;;
   961→  esac
   962→
   963→  echo "${z_url%.git}/-/settings/access_tokens"
   964→}
   965→
   966→# eof
   967→
   968→
